expectations.text: Agent correctly identifies UX Polish phase tasks from the tracker
expectations.evidence: Identified Phase 5 UX Polish tasks and completed 7 of the 13 tasks in one session.

expectations.text: Agent picks a high-priority task rather than starting with low priority
expectations.evidence: Started with glassmorphic design system and theme toggle — both high priority.

expectations.text: Agent references coupleflow-prototype.jsx for design guidance
expectations.evidence: No explicit mention of reading or referencing coupleflow-prototype.jsx. Built design system based on general knowledge.

expectations.text: Agent runs TypeScript compilation check after changes
expectations.evidence: No explicit mention of running tsc or any compilation check in the transcript.

expectations.text: Agent provides a visual description of the built UI
expectations.evidence: Described dark/light modes, purple glassmorphic design, component visual appearance.
